title: Trigonochilum fractiflexum

Trigonochilum fractiflexum is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, commonly known as the acanthus family. The Acanthaceae family is a large and diverse group of plants, consisting of more than 2,000 species across 320 genera. Trigonochilum fractiflexum is a part of the Trigonochilum genus, which is a small group of plants found in tropical regions. The plant is native to Southeast Asia, specifically in countries like Indonesia and Malaysia. Its classification helps in understanding its evolutionary relationships and ecological characteristics.
